channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-22T09:05Z — 667 outages, 21,788 customers, 381 fair-weather, 6 DC-proximate
item.description: VA-DOM: 1599 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | VA-DOM: 1551 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | OH-AEP: 1500 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | NC-DEC: 1076 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | VA-DOM: 1074 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY)

item.title: Weekly digest — week ending 2026-07-19: 8322 outages, 41.9% fair-weather
